steps.title: Use the difficulty clues
steps.content: The poems have strange images, experimental syntax, and opaque subject matter. The passage also says scholars debate them, so the blank should describe difficulty understanding their meaning.

steps.title: Choose the meaning-related verb
steps.content: The needed word means to explain or understand meaning. A means assign a task, B means create, and D means formally reject; none fits poems that are difficult because their subject matter is unclear. The answer is C.
